name: Sweet and Sour Sauce
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces canned pineapple chunks in juice (reserve)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the reserved pineapple juice, all remaining ingredients, and ensure the cornstarch is well mixed.
2. Use this homemade sweet-and-sour sauce with stir-fried chicken or pork and assorted vegetables like green peppers, onions, carrots, celery, water chestnuts, and tomatoes.
3. This sauce offers a deliciously authentic flavor without the artificial red color often found in restaurant sauces and is more budget-friendly than store-bought options.
